# Spec 0001 — Foundation (sample portfolio)

## R-SMP-001 — repo scaffold
The sample portfolio has a README, a LICENSE, and an AGENTS.md.

## R-SMP-002 — input contract
The sample tool accepts a trace directory and a spec ledger directory.

## R-SMP-003 — output contract
The sample tool writes a single directory per run.

## R-SMP-004 — promotion gate
Nothing in the sample tool mutates the ledger.
